web.title: 72 Carlyle: Building
web.description: 72 Carlyle is where Miami Beach is heading. We wanted to elevate the benchmarks of quality and design at what I consider to be the best location on Miami Beach.
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://72carlyle.com/#main-content)

A Lefferts Development

**A Lefferts Development**

> _Miami Beach has been a place that always inspired me. It is where natural beauty meets a sophisticated coastal lifestyle. That’s why we were excited to partner with Lefferts to craft the ultimate beachside address in the rising NoBe district._

Piero Lissoni, Designer

72 Park

72 Carlyle

Elegant & poised, 20 stories overlooking Miami Beach

![](https://72carlyle.com/img/clipart/leaf-shadow-1.webp)![](https://72carlyle.com/img/clipart/leaf-shadow-1.webp)

## Moments   from your  _Beach Club_

72 Carlyle is a place that inspires, framed by the breathtaking splendor of the beach, and the mesmerizing ebb & flow of the Intracoastal Waterway. The soaring silhouette, complemented by expansive private terraces, showcases the beauty of water everywhere. This is a place where natural beauty meets a sophisticated coastal lifestyle. A Lefferts Development, this is the ultimate address on Miami Beach.

> _72 Carlyle is where Miami Beach is heading. We wanted to elevate the benchmarks of quality and design at what I consider to be the best location on Miami Beach. Our setting provides the residences with unparalleled views of the Atlantic Ocean and Intracoastal. This address anchors a sophisticated residential enclave, surrounded by parks and an esplanade lined with al fresco dining, moments from every landmark that makes living on the beach so desirable._

Mendy Chudaitov_Founder of Lefferts_

Tropical & private, landscaped porte cochere

24/7 attended reception

## Arrive to  _a Work of Art_

The porte cochère establishes the sensorial sophistication of 72 Carlyle. Piero Lissoni injects La Dolce Vita into every aspect of the residential experience. Custom tile work and illuminated landscaping define the private residential driveway. The double-height lobby is grand and welcoming with custom millwork, a carved marble reception desk, attended 24/7, and a sitting area curated with Lissoni’s most acclaimed furniture designs.

The lobby showcases lissoni’s acclaimed furniture designs

![](https://72carlyle.com/img/clipart/leaf-shadow-2.webp)

[_Residences_](https://72carlyle.com/residences)

web.description: 72 Carlyle Residences Miami Beach, features 125 luxury residences in a 239424 square foot tower with spectacular views in a fantastic ...

[![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/MRG-LOGO-White.png)](https://miamiresidential.com/)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Banner-72-Carlyle-Miami.jpg)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/01-72-Carlyle-Featured.jpg)

# 72 Carlyle North Beach

### **New Construction / 2028**

20 Stories / 134 Residences of
Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms

**602 72nd St, Miami Beach, FL 33141, USA**

72 Carlyle Miami Beach features 134 luxury residences in a 239,424 square foot tower. The renowned architect Piero Lissoni developed a bold and modern aesthetic. Amenities include a pool, gym, lush landscaping and social lounge. Its efficient modern design can be experienced in all amenities and residences. 72 Carlyle Miami Beach sets a new standard for Miami’s residential developments. Its desirable location in North Miami Beach is near sidewalk cafes, country clubs, Lincoln Road and Bal Harbour Shops, providing something different to do every day.

This content is preliminary and is not the official information of the developer

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $1,170,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/72carlyle/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

Developed by Lefferts

Website: [https://72Carlyle.miami/](https://72carlyle.miami/)

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $1,170,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/72carlyle/#contactform) for more information.

## Features

### Building Features

- Double-height lobby
- 24-hour attended reception
- Private Porte cochere featuring valet parking and EV charging access
- Smart building integrated with high-speed fiber-optic wireless internet access throughout common areas
- 24-hour monitoring throughout all building access points
- Over 45,000 square feet of exclusive indoor and outdoor residential amenities
- Lavishly landscaped resort pool with pool-side cabanas
- Outdoor landscaped exhibition padel courts
- Lido terrace and dining pergola
- Three interconnected social suites can be combined for larger events. The spaces include the aperitivo lounge with a multitude of seating areas and the wine cellar featuring a chef’s kitchen
- Technogym studio, fully equipped, state-of-the-art fitness center
- Yoga studio, ideal for private training sessions
- Resident’s spa, with private treatment room, steam room and sauna
- Outdoor hot and cold plunge
- Library
- Co-working lounge
- Immersive kids playroom
- Landscaped amenity sky terrace, at the top of the building, with view deck, dining areas and wet bar

### Residence Features

- Meticulously detailed condominium residences, designed by Piero Lissoni
- Each residence offers a private expansive terrace, select homes offer an outdoor wet bar
- Panoramic ocean, Intracoastal, and direct park views
- Elevated ceiling heights up to 10 feet
- Floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors and impact-resistant glass throughout
- High-speed elevators with access control
- Eleven exceptional penthouse residences located on the top floors
- Private elevator landings with direct access (select residences)
- Dramatic layouts offer 12- to 14-foot ceiling heights and wrap-around glass walls opening onto private terraces
- Select penthouses feature a Lissoni social terrace with private rooftop pool, ample seating, and outdoor kitchen with wine cooler and sink
- Stylishly curated with custom Italian cabinetry and contemporary hardware
- Top-of-the-line integrated Gaggenau appliance suite
- Glass paneled under-counter, temperature controlled, wine storage (select residences)
- Elegant, imported stone countertops and backsplashes
- Gourmet sink and faucet
- Most homes offer five-fixture bathrooms with double vanity, a stand-alone soaking tub, and separate glass-enclosed rainforest shower
- Imported European crafted dual sink vanity with signature fittings
- Elegant, imported stone countertops and backsplashes

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/17-72-Carlyle-Pool.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Developers-72-Park-b.jpg)

Founded in New York City and with more than twenty years of experience in the industry, Lefferts stands as an unsurpassed force in the realm of privately owned real estate development. Lefferts has made substantial investments to revitalize Miami Beach’s 71st Street Corridor and Park District.

## Latest News

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/121-MR.jpg)

### 72 Carlyle was formally launched!

A new luxury residential tower is accepting reservations in the North Beach area, right next door to and virtually a twin tower of 72 Park. Prices will start at $1.1M with amazing city and water views. Great opportunity.

Updated on: 09/18/2025
